# Tanu's Salon Dé Beauté

> Bhopal's top-rated beauty parlour located in Bag Mugaliya, Madhya Pradesh, India. Expert bridal makeup, facials, hair styling, waxing, threading, and mehndi services. Over 15 years of expertise under head beautician Tanu. Serving Bag Mugaliya, Bagsewaniya, BHEL Sangam Colony, Karond, Gulabi Nagar, Nishatpura, Misrod, Hoshangabad Road, Katara Hills, Kolar Road and all of Bhopal.

## Business Details

- **Name:** Tanu's Salon Dé Beauté
- **Also known as:** Tanu's Salon, Tanu Salon Bhopal, Tanu Beauty Parlour
- **Owner / Head Beautician:** Tanu (15+ years of experience)
- **Address:** Phase-2, E-12, Bagsewaniya, Sant Ashram Nagar, BHEL Sangam Colony, Bag Mugaliya, Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh 462043, India
- **Phone:** +91-9827340282
- **Email:** info@tanussalon.com
- **Hours:** Daily 11:00 AM – 7:00 PM (open Sundays)
- **Payment:** Cash, UPI, Credit Card, Debit Card
- **Price range:** ₹₹ (mid-range)
- **Ratings:** 4.9/5 from 120+ reviews

## Services Offered

- [Services page](https://tanusalon.netlify.app/#services): full list of beauty treatments
- **Bridal makeup:** HD bridal makeup, airbrush makeup, pre-bridal skin packages, on-location bridal services across Bhopal
- **Makeup:** party and occasion makeup, everyday natural makeup, engagement/reception looks
- **Hair:** haircut, styling, hair treatments, hair spa
- **Facials:** classic cleansing, hydrating, anti-aging, brightening/de-tan, acne control, sensitive skin, luxury spa
- **Skin care:** waxing, threading, eyebrow shaping, bleaching, de-tan treatments
- **Henna:** mehndi and henna art for weddings and occasions
- **Grooming:** personal grooming packages, pre-bridal packages
- **Training:** professional beauty and makeup training courses

## Areas Served in Bhopal

Bag Mugaliya, Bag Sewaniya, Bagsewaniya, Sant Ashram Nagar, BHEL Sangam Colony, Karond, Gulabi Nagar, Nishatpura, Misrod, Hoshangabad Road, Katara Hills, Kolar Road, Berasia Road, and all neighbouring areas of Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh.

## Pages

- [Home](https://tanusalon.netlify.app/): hero, services overview, gallery, testimonials, contact
- [About](https://tanusalon.netlify.app/about): Tanu's story, philosophy and 15+ years of expertise

## Social Media

Tanu has a large, active following on both platforms — these are the primary sources of recent client work, before-and-after photos, and bridal portfolios.

- [Instagram @makeup_artist_tanu_](https://www.instagram.com/makeup_artist_tanu_/): bridal makeup portfolio, reels, daily work, client transformations
- [Facebook: Tanu Salon](https://www.facebook.com/tanusalon): client reviews, updates, photos

## Booking

- **Phone:** +91-9827340282 (call or WhatsApp)
- **Contact form:** [https://tanusalon.netlify.app/#contact](https://tanusalon.netlify.app/#contact)
- **Walk-ins welcome**, appointments preferred for bridal and party makeup
